overall.description: First-person exploration through a flooded post-apocalyptic urban wasteland at sunset, transitioning to a night scene on a neon-lit city street corner. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring high-fidelity rendering of decaying environments and futuristic cityscapes.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban wasteland with scattered debris

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through shallow floodwater filled with trash bags and debris, heading toward the distant city skyline

entered.detail: numerous black garbage bags floating in the floodwater and piled on debris
soaked cardboard boxes and paper trash scattered across the water
modern glass skyscrapers silhouetted against the setting sun
corroded metal drums partially submerged in the floodwater
tall electrical transmission towers against the hillside

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily through a flooded wasteland littered with black trash bags, cardboard debris, and rusted barrels. The setting sun creates a golden backlight behind the distant modern city skyline, while dead vegetation and electrical towers dot the landscape. The water reflects the warm sky as the character wades through the shallow flood.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with makeshift campfire

events.description: hard cut from outdoor flooded wasteland to dark covered urban street corner at night
large armored truck and car drive past on the wet street

agents.ego_description: standing near a burning barrel watching traffic pass on the rainy street

notable_agents.action: large armored truck driving past on the wet asphalt road

entered.detail: metal barrel with active fire providing warmth and light
orange and white striped concrete barriers lining the sidewalk
illuminated advertisements and building lights on the street facade
text overlay indicating location as Amaro Street in Night City

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a dark urban street corner at night, where a fire burns in a makeshift barrel beside cardboard shelters. Traffic barriers line the concrete sidewalk as vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt. Neon signs illuminate the background buildings, and the location is identified as Amaro Street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a desolate, flooded wasteland at sunset into a neon-lit urban street corner at night. It begins by wading through shallow, reflective water littered with black trash bags and rusted barrels, moving toward a distant modern skyline backlit by a golden sun. As the environment shifts from the open wasteland with its dead vegetation and electrical towers, the scene seamlessly opens onto the concrete sidewalks of Amaro Street. The warm sunset light gives way to the dark atmosphere of the city, where a fire burns in a makeshift barrel beside cardboard shelters. Finally, the camera settles amidst the glow of neon signs and the movement of vehicles on wet asphalt, framed by traffic barriers.
